fields.doc: Idempotency key: SHA-256 hex of source bank, account id and transaction id; recomputed and enforced by a model validator
fields.name: transaction_id

fields.doc: Canonical key of the owning account, '{source_bank}:{source_account_id}'
fields.name: account_id

fields.doc: Which bank the transaction came from
fields.name: source_bank

fields.doc: The bank's own account identifier, verbatim
fields.name: source_account_id

fields.doc: The bank's own transaction identifier; content-derived for sources without stable ids (ADR-0001)
fields.name: source_transaction_id

fields.doc: Lifecycle state; booked rows must carry a booking_date
fields.name: status

fields.doc: Date the bank booked the transaction; required when booked
fields.name: booking_date

fields.doc: Date the amount affects the balance, when reported
fields.name: value_date

fields.doc: Signed amount in the account currency; negative is an outflow, zero is rejected
fields.name: amount

fields.doc: ISO 4217 code of the account currency
fields.name: currency

fields.doc: Counterparty display name, when the source provides one
fields.name: counterparty_name

fields.doc: Counterparty account identifier, when the source provides one
fields.name: counterparty_account

fields.doc: The bank's category label verbatim; categorizer lineage
fields.name: raw_category

fields.doc: Normalized spend category; uncategorized until the categorizer assigns one
fields.name: category
